summary.fix_detail_1: RSN Deals: light-mode → dark-mode conversion (+12 pts, FAIL→PASS)
summary.fix_detail_2: 10 negotiation panels: dark mode CSS injection batch pass (+2 to +5 pts each, all FAIL→PASS)
summary.fix_detail_3: 4 minimal-pass panels (NHL, MLB, WBD, BravesVision): spacing lift (+1 to +2 pts, all pushed above 22 threshold margin)
summary.data_fail_note: 3 mobile FAIL scores (Results iPhone, Dispatch iPhone, Results iPad) are data-server failures not CSS failures — local dev server does not serve JSON feeds at the expected path. CSS design is PASS-quality. Fix: run local server with data/ folder served at /data/mobile/.
watch_items: nego-nesn, nego-marquee, nego-msg, nego-nba, nego-charter: minimal-pass panels not yet upgraded (already passed pre-session, not remediated per mission rules). Consider a targeted pass if desired.
nego-wbd: score 23 — content-heavy by nature (9 open issues), spacing improved but density inherent to content volume
